---
title: "Clase 6: Ahorcado en Python"
format: html
resources:
    - ahorcado/
    - ahorcado.zip
    - 404.txt
---


[Descargar carpeta del proyecto](ahorcado.zip)

```{=html}
<style>
.cm-file-browser {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr;
  height: 650px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.cm-sidebar {
  padding: 0.75rem;
  border-right: 1px solid #ddd;
  overflow-y: auto;
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
  background: #fafafa;
}

.cm-file {
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.cm-file:hover {
  background: #eaeaea;
}

.cm-file.active {
  background: #dbeafe;
}

details summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.cm-editor-wrap {
  min-width: 0;
}

#cm-filename {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
}

#cm-editor {
  height: 610px;
}

.cm-editor {
  height: 100%;
}
</style>

<div class="cm-file-browser">
  <div class="cm-sidebar" id="cm-file-list"></div>
  <div class="cm-editor-wrap">
    <h3 id="cm-filename">Seleccionar archivo</h3>
    <div id="cm-editor"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
import { EditorView, basicSetup } from "https://esm.sh/codemirror";
import { EditorState } from "https://esm.sh/@codemirror/state";
import { python } from "https://esm.sh/@codemirror/lang-python";
import { json } from "https://esm.sh/@codemirror/lang-json";
import { markdown } from "https://esm.sh/@codemirror/lang-markdown";
import { oneDark } from "https://esm.sh/@codemirror/theme-one-dark";

const fileList = document.getElementById("cm-file-list");
const filename = document.getElementById("cm-filename");

const tree = {
    "datos": {
        "estadistica.json": "ahorcado/datos/estadistica.json",
        "lenguaje.json": "ahorcado/datos/lenguaje.json",
        "programacion.json": "ahorcado/datos/programacion.json",
        "raras.json": "ahorcado/datos/raras.json"
    },
    "sonidos": {
        "block.wav": "404.txt",
        "fail.wav": "404.txt",
        "win.wav": "404.txt",
        "wrong.wav": "404.txt"
    },
    "ahorcado.py": "ahorcado/ahorcado.py",
    "README.md": "ahorcado/README.md"
};

function languageFor(path) {
  if (path.endsWith(".py")) return python();
  if (path.endsWith(".json")) return json();
  if (path.endsWith(".md")) return markdown();
  return [];
}

let editor = new EditorView({
  state: EditorState.create({
    doc: "Selecciona un archivo desde el panel lateral.",
    extensions: [
      basicSetup,
      oneDark,
      EditorView.editable.of(false),
      EditorState.readOnly.of(true)
    ]
  }),
  parent: document.getElementById("cm-editor")
});

async function openFile(path, element) {
  filename.textContent = path;

  document.querySelectorAll(".cm-file").forEach(el => {
    el.classList.remove("active");
  });
  element.classList.add("active");

  const response = await fetch(path);
  const text = response.ok
    ? await response.text()
    : `Could not load ${path}`;

  editor.setState(EditorState.create({
    doc: text,
    extensions: [
      basicSetup,
      oneDark,
      languageFor(path),
      EditorView.editable.of(false),
      EditorState.readOnly.of(true)
    ]
  }));
}

function renderTree(node, parent) {
  Object.entries(node).forEach(([name, value]) => {
    if (typeof value === "string") {
      const item = document.createElement("div");
      item.className = "cm-file";
      item.textContent = name;
      item.onclick = () => openFile(value, item);
      parent.appendChild(item);
    } else {
      const folder = document.createElement("details");
      folder.open = true;

      const summary = document.createElement("summary");
      summary.textContent = name;
      folder.appendChild(summary);

      const children = document.createElement("div");
      children.style.paddingLeft = "1rem";
      folder.appendChild(children);

      renderTree(value, children);
      parent.appendChild(folder);
    }
  });
}

renderTree(tree, fileList);
</script>
```
